name: Chef Freddy's Apple Rhubarb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, combine the rhubarb, sugar, and cinnamon. Mix well to coat.
2. Let stand for about ten to fifteen minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. After the set time, add the apple pie filling, spice, and tapioca to the rhubarb mixture. Mix well.
4. Place the bottom pastry into the pie dish, pressing it into all corners. Add the fruit and cover with the remaining pastry, sealing and fluting the edges.
5. Bake in a pre-heated 325°F oven for 35 to 40 minutes. Let cool completely before serving.
Note: Graham cracker, shortbread, and chocolate cookie (prepared) pie crusts do not work well with this recipe.
